  "actions": [
    "Verify torque values using a calibrated torque wrench",

  "rationale": "The absence of torque marks or witness lines on the flanged joint fasteners indicates a failure to document or verify that the bolts were tightened to the specified torque in accordance with ASME PCC-1 guidelines.
